description: A population health analyst needs to identify diabetic patients who are at high risk for hospital readmission.

nodes.task_description: Open the population health analytics platform.
Create a cohort of all patients with a diagnosis of diabetes.

expected_outcome.value: The system generates a list of all diabetic patients in the population.

nodes.task_description: Apply a risk stratification model to the cohort to identify patients with the highest readmission risk scores.

expected_outcome.value: The system produces a prioritized list of high-risk patients who should be targeted for care management interventions.
